examples: At the end of this article, we deeply discussed how to improve the sensitivity of immunoassay that used the phycoerythrin fluor as probes.
The time resolved polarized fluorescence of oriented R phycoerythrin single crystal from red alga Porphyra yezoensis was studied in picosecond time scale.
ObjectiveTo screen for the optimal washing buffer in R-phycoerythrin fluorescence immunoassay MethodsChange the ionic intensity and pH value of the washing buffer.
